---
title: "ISSS608-VAA"
---

Hello, my name is ***Serene Cheng***. Welcome to **ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications**. In this website, you will find my coursework prepared for this course. Credits to **Professor Kam Tin Seong** for his valuable lessons and the course materials!

If you're interested, you can navigate to the right to find out more about me!
